title: acer palmatum subsp. pubescens
intro: Acer palmatum subsp. pubescens, also known as the Japanese maple with hairy leaves, is a subspecies of the Japanese maple tree. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Acer palmatum subsp. pubescens include reducing stress and anxiety, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant typically include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and promote relaxation.
